title: fix: reduce top-up quest reward
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Reduces the active Top up Pollen quest reward from 10 to 5 tier pollen.
- Updates the catalog test expectation.
- Leaves existing reward rows untouched.

gist.headline: Balancing the nectar
gist.blurb: We've fine-tuned the rewards for the Top-up Pollen quest to keep the hive's economy perfectly balanced.
gist.summary: The reward for the Top-up Pollen quest has been adjusted from 10 to 5 tier pollen for new completions.
gist.impact: Users completing the top-up quest will now receive 5 tier pollen, while previously claimed rewards remain untouched.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee organizing glowing jars of pollen on a cozy wooden shelf, representing economy balancing.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot carefully organizing small glowing jars of golden pollen on a rustic wooden shelf. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
